display_duration.description: How long to display this plugin (seconds)

agency_id.description: Transit agency preset. 'mta' = NYC MTA; 'custom' = supply your own GTFS-RT URL.

station_id.description: GTFS Stop ID for the station to monitor (e.g. 'R16' for Times Sq-42 St). Search by name in the web UI.

route_ids.description: Filter to specific route IDs (e.g. ["N","Q"]). Empty = all routes at the station.

max_arrivals.description: Maximum upcoming arrivals to show per direction

per_direction_secs.description: Seconds to display each direction card before cycling to the next

live_priority.description: Pre-empt other plugins when a train is imminent (within live_threshold_mins)

live_threshold_mins.description: Minutes-until-arrival that triggers live priority takeover

window_minutes.description: How many minutes ahead to show arrivals

gtfs_rt_url.description: GTFS-RT TripUpdates feed URL (required when agency_id = 'custom')

api_key.description: API key for the feed (optional, only needed by some agencies)

api_key_header.description: HTTP header name for the API key (default: 'x-api-key')
